{{Quote|I hitched a ride aboard an Alliance supply ship and was unceremoniously dropped off in the savage rain forests of Yuga Two–a very covert base of operations, but assuredly a most uninteresting place.|Lieutenant Voren Na'al, Assistant Historian|<ref name="GG1-1" />}}
'''Yuga 2''' was the second [[Planet/Legends|planet]] in the [[Yuga system/Legends|Yuga system]].<ref name="Atlas" /> It was covered in rain forests. The world played host to the popular [[Yuga Planetary Park]], a tourist destination visited by [[Galaxy Tours/Legends|Galaxy Tours]].<ref name="CSWE" /> It was the site of a raid on a Galaxy Tours cruiser by [[Callow Batta]] prior to the [[Battle of Hoth/Legends|Battle of Hoth]].<ref name="air">''[[Alliance Intelligence Reports]]''</ref>

{{Planet-stub}}
